title: Harden closeout evidence guard
goal: Make verified and done transitions require typed evidence, source authority, hash binding and queue cleanup.

acceptance.assertion: A task cannot become verified without receipt id, evidence hash, command/source reference and task or PR binding where applicable.
Terminal tasks are absent from active queue lanes after closeout.
AI or prose summaries alone are rejected as closeout evidence.

metadata.advance_reason: BUREAU-DETERMINISTIC-OPS-V1-T004 is verified by this registry state; the next deterministic hardening ball is the closeout evidence guard.
